title: Robert Eickenroht
compiled_truth: Robert Eickenroht is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-12 to 2002-01-25), Robert Eickenroht sent 17 and received 104 emails, totalling 121 interactions.
